theme: ice wizard bending three colors of light
title: Trichroic Ice Lattice: One Lens, Three Colors
strategies: trivial: the all-zero lattice (checker's own baseline; no budget spent, rays go straight)
greedy: a single symmetric converging lens centered at the beam entry, tuned to focus ONLY the reference (middle-dispersion) color onto its target -- the classical achromatic-lens trap

strong: joint deterministic search over the lens's center/width/strength/extent that maximizes the COUPLED 3-color objective at once, exploiting chromatic-splitting (each color bends by a different amount through the same lattice) to route all three colors to distinct targets from one shared entry point
invalid: out-of-range refractive levels -> infeasible, scores 0
